Description
org.praxisplatform.uischema.command
Host-neutral contracts for governed resource command execution.

Camada base de controllers REST metadata-driven do starter.

    AbstractCollectionCommandResourceController.executeCollectionCommand(String commandId, Object payload, ResourceCommandResponsePolicy responsePolicy, ResourceCommandExecutionProvider provider)
    Executa um comando collection-level pelo boundary governado da plataforma.
    protected org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?>
    AbstractCollectionCommandResourceController.executeCollectionCommand(String commandId, Object payload, ResourceCommandResponsePolicy responsePolicy, ResourceCommandExecutionProvider provider, Map<String,Object> publicMetadata)
    Executa um comando collection-level incluindo somente metadata publica e sanitizavel.
